description: Colombian regional paramilitary group founded in 1979 by Héctor José Buitrago Rodríguez. Initially engaged in land dispossession, drug trafficking, and extortion, later also using oil royalties and land holdings for financing. After Buitrago's capture in 1997, his son 'Martín Llanos' took control. The group fought a war with the AUC-affiliated Bloque Centauros and is still active.
